summary: Localized Home protocol schedule/status projection by keeping ProtocolScheduleRules semantic and moving visible row/help text formatting into Home presentation code backed by Localizable.strings across all 19 locales.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-protocol-schedule-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: ProtocolScheduleRules summary values carried English display strings such as scheduled today, weekend, this week, and custom range labels.
contract_status_changes.after: ProtocolScheduleRules returns semantic preset, normalized date range, and schedule/window state values only; no localized or English presentation copy lives in the domain rule.

contract_status_changes.before: HomeView displayed schedule summary text produced by domain rules and built schedule help text with inline English copy.
contract_status_changes.after: HomeView formats Home protocol schedule row labels and schedule help text through HomeProtocolSchedulePresentationFormatting backed by Localizable.strings.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-protocol-schedule-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Localization resources contained 203 static keys and 11 plural keys, with protocol schedule projection deferred.
contract_status_changes.after: All 19 locales contain 213 static keys and 11 plural keys, including Home protocol schedule/status projection keys.

residual_risks: Non-English Home protocol schedule/status values remain English placeholders and require translation-quality review.
Notification copy was intentionally excluded and remains the next runtime-owned dynamic localization batch.
Today projection text, recurrence display-name adapters, and broader domain/application string helpers remain deferred.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning unrelated to this slice.
No running-app locale smoke, screenshot proof, device proof, or TestFlight proof was captured.
recommended_next_reason: Notification titles/bodies are the next documented dynamic localization batch, but should stay in the reminder/runtime path that owns scheduling side effects rather than moving copy into pure domain rules.
